channel.title: Life on LIVING NOW
channel.description: Recent content in Life on LIVING NOW

item.title: Devouring lovers and a Christmas market
item.author: GIGKOMUSIC@gmail.com (GIGKO)
item.description:
Today is the first day in December and I went outside to visit the Hamburger Bahnhof Gallery and the WeihnachtsZauber Gendarmenmarkt Christmas Market.

The “Devouring Lovers” exhibition by Eva Fàbregas is now going on in Hamburger Bahnhof Gallery and here are some photos I shot there today.

item.title: What I will post on my blog
item.author: GIGKOMUSIC@gmail.com (GIGKO)
item.description: I have finished building my personal blog recently and now any post can be smoothly published. So immediately the next comes to me is what will I post on my blog? change a word.
